ddls:
CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific question the response is for */,
  "frequency_of_participation" TEXT /* Frequency of participation in religious activities (e.g., At least once a week, Once or twice a month) */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* The actual response value (e.g., text for open-ended questions) */,
  "response_confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the participant in their response (1-5) */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if a follow-up is needed for the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey response was submitted */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Total number of responses in the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the participant */,
  "religious_affiliation" TEXT /* Religious affiliation of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the participant */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income range of the participant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the survey question (e.g., Religious Beliefs, Evolution) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the question was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the question is currently active in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES survey_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external data (e.g., historical religious data, demographic statistics) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., CSV, JSON, API) */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the external data */,
  "imported_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was imported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
